creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pawel       2011-10-02 18:41:21 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/libfprint   Makefile distinfo 
    security/libfprint/files patch-libfprint_Makefile.in 
  Added files:
    security/libfprint/files patch-config.h.in 
  Removed files:
    security/libfprint/files extra-patch-usb patch-Makefile.in 
                             patch-configure 
                             patch-libfprint_data.c 
                             patch-libfprint_imgdev.c 
  Log:
  - Update to version 0.4.0
  - Mark MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE
  - Mark IGNORE on FreeBSD < 8, needs libusb>=1.0
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:             ports/161224
  Submitted by:   Zhihao Yuan <lichray@gmail.com>
  Approved by:    miwi, wen (mentors implicit)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
